name: Pumkin-Lemon Creme Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first seven ingredients together.
2. Pour the mixture into the pie shell.
3. Bake at 425 degrees F for 15 minutes.
4. Reduce the heat to 350 degrees F.
5. Continue baking for about 45 more minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool for 20 minutes.
7. Blend together the sour cream, brown sugar, lemon juice, and lemon peel.
8. Spread this mixture evenly over the pie.
9. Bake for an additional 10 minutes.
10. Sprinkle the top with chopped pecans.
11. Serve warm or cold.
